title: lithocarpus rassa
intro: Lithocarpus rassa is a species of tree in the beech family, Fagaceae, native to the Himalayas. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its bark and leaves, which are used to treat various health conditions. Its health benefits include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Lithocarpus rassa is typically prepared as a herbal tea or decoction by boiling its bark and leaves in water to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
